results.title: Renault Duster Automatic To Become More Affordable With New Variant: Report
results.description: The launch of a new, affordable automatic variant of the Renault Duster will reduce the price gap between the manual and automatic variants.

results.title: new Zealand great Kane Williamson retires from international cricket
results.description: Kane Williamson, New Zealand's all-time leading run-scorer, retires from international cricket at 35, concluding a 16-year career with 19,346 runs.
